keywords: fastener glossary, procurement terms, FOB, CIF, MOQ, mill test certificate, Africa import

body.en: FOB (Free on Board): Seller delivers goods onto the vessel. Buyer bears all costs and risks from that point. CIF (Cost, Insurance, Freight): Seller pays for delivery, insurance, and freight to destination port. EXW (Ex Works): Buyer picks up goods at seller's premises. DDP (Delivered Duty Paid): Seller delivers to buyer, paid all costs including duties. For related information, see Concrete Screws Anchors Guide. Related resources: high-tensile bolts anchor bolts stainless steel fasteners hex bolts lock nuts washers self-drilling screws socket screws. This procurement framework applies to fastener sourcing for construction, mining, energy, automotive, and general industrial applications. The decision logic prioritizes quality consistency, supplier reliability, and total cost of ownership over short-term unit price. For B2B buyers in Africa, Latin America, and Southeast Asia, additional considerations include regional customs requirements, container consolidation options, and payment security mechanisms. Standardized specifications that travel across projects reduce training time, RFQ processing time, and supplier onboarding effort. Standardized specifications that travel across projects reduce training time, RFQ processing time, and supplier onboarding effort.

Mill Test Certificate (MTC): Document certifying chemical composition and mechanical properties of steel. Also called material test report or inspection certificate. Certificate of Origin: Document certifying the country where goods were manufactured. Quality Control Certificate: Third-party inspection report confirming product quality. For related information, see Southern Africa Fastener Market Southafrica Botswana. Standards-based procurement requires continuous learning as ISO, ASTM, DIN, and GB standards are revised every 3-5 years. Subscribe to standards update notifications and review specifications annually. The most common standards used in international fastener trade are ISO 898-1 (mechanical properties), ISO 3506-1 (stainless), ISO 3269 (acceptance inspection), ISO 4042 (coatings), and ISO 1502 (thread gauges). For B2B buyers, building a standards reference library with at least the top 20 standards relevant to your product mix is essential. MOQ (Minimum Order Quantity): Minimum number of pieces per order. Batch Code: Identification number linking products to specific manufacturing batch. Lead Time: Time from order placement to shipment. Payment Terms: Common options include T/T (Telegraphic Transfer), L/C (Letter of Credit), or payment platforms like Alibaba Trade Assurance. For related information, see East Africa Construction Fastener Market. The comparison methodology above uses typical ranges from industry data and TradeGo procurement experience 2018-2024. Actual market prices fluctuate with raw material costs (steel, zinc, nickel), energy costs, labor costs, and currency exchange rates. For accurate comparison, request identical RFQs from 3-5 qualified suppliers and compare landed cost (product + shipping + insurance + duties). The lowest unit price is rarely the lowest total cost of ownership. The comparison methodology above uses typical ranges from industry data and TradeGo procurement experience 2018-2024. The lowest unit price is rarely the lowest total cost of ownership.

Container Load: 20ft container holds approximately 10-15 tons of fasteners. 40ft container holds approximately 20-25 tons. Consolidation: Combining small orders with other buyers to fill a container. Freight Forwarder: Company that arranges shipping logistics. Bill of Lading (B/L): Document of title for shipped goods. The verification checklist applies to both initial supplier qualification and ongoing batch inspection. For high-risk applications (load-bearing structural, pressure vessels, mining, marine), add fatigue testing, salt-spray testing (ASTM B117), torque-tension testing, and post-installation inspection. The cost of additional verification is 0.1-0.3% of order value, while undetected quality failures can be 10-100x the order value in damages. Pre-shipment Inspection (PSI): Inspection before shipment by third-party like SGS, Bureau Veritas, or Intertek. Dimensional Inspection: Checking thread pitch, head dimensions, overall length against specifications. Visual Inspection: Checking for surface defects, coating quality, packaging condition. Salt Spray Test: Testing corrosion resistance of coatings in accelerated salt spray environment. For related information, see Southern Africa Fastener Market Southafrica Botswana. Supplier evaluation should be a continuous process, not a one-time exercise. Re-evaluate suppliers annually based on delivery performance, quality metrics, price competitiveness, and responsiveness. Maintain a supplier scorecard with weighted metrics: on-time delivery (25%), quality acceptance rate (30%), price competitiveness (20%), responsiveness (15%), and documentation accuracy (10%). Drop suppliers scoring below 70% over a 6-month period and qualify replacements. Supplier evaluation should be a continuous process, not a one-time exercise. For related information, see East Africa Construction Fastener Market. For B2B buyers operating in multiple countries, harmonize specifications with regional standards and local customs requirements. Common regional frameworks: SABS (South Africa), KEBS (Kenya), TBS (Tanzania), ZIMRA (Zimbabwe), SON (Nigeria), and AfCFTA standards for pan-Africa trade. Local standards compliance is often mandatory for public infrastructure projects, mining operations, and government tenders. body.zh:
## 非洲买家完整紧固件规格

采购非洲市场紧固件时，了解完整规格对于质量控制和竞争性定价至关重要。
body.es:
## Comprehensive Specifications for African Buyers

When procuring fasteners for African markets, understanding the complete specifications is critical for quality control and competitive pricing.

### Mechanical Properties

**Property Class 4.6 (Low Carbon)**
- Tensile strength: 400 MPa
- Yield strength: 240 MPa
- Elongation: 22%
- Applications: Non-critical, light duty

**Property Class 8.8 (Medium Carbon)**
- Tensile strength: 800 MPa
- Yield strength: 640 MPa
- Elongation: 12%
- Applications: Most common for construction

**Property Class 10.9 (Alloy Steel)**
- Tensile strength: 1000 MPa
- Yield strength: 900 MPa
- Elongation: 9%
- Applications: High-stress structural

**Property Class 12.9 (Alloy Steel)**
- Tensile strength: 1200 MPa
- Yield strength: 1100 MPa
- Elongation: 8%
- Applications: Automotive, critical applications

### Standard Cross-Reference

| Standard | Region | Common Use |
|----------|--------|------------|
| ISO 898 | International | Mechanical properties |
| DIN 933 | Germany/Europe | Hex head bolts |
| ANSI/ASME B18.2.1 | North America | Hex bolts |
| GB 5783 | China | Hex head bolts |
| JIS B1180 | Japan | Hex bolts |
| SANS 1700 | South Africa | General fasteners |

### Thread Pitch and Sizes

Common thread pitches for African procurement:
- **Coarse (UNC)**: M6×1.0, M8×1.25, M10×1.5, M12×1.75
- **Fine (UNF)**: M6×0.75, M8×1.0, M10×1.25, M12×1.5
- **Extra fine (UNEF)**: M10×1.0, M12×1.25

### Surface Coatings for African Conditions

| Coating | Salt Spray (hours) | Cost (relative) | Best For |
|---------|-------------------|----------------|----------|
| Zinc plating (clear) | 48-96 | 1.0× | Indoor, dry climate |
| Zinc plating (yellow) | 96-200 | 1.1× | General outdoor |
| Hot-dip galvanizing | 500-1000 | 1.8× | Coastal, harsh |
| Dacromet | 500-1000 | 2.0× | High corrosion |
| Stainless 304 (A2) | 1000+ | 4.0× | Premium projects |
| Stainless 316 (A4) | 2000+ | 5.5× | Marine, chemical |

For most African construction projects, **hot-dip galvanizing** or **Dacromet** offers the best balance of cost and corrosion resistance.

| Stainless 316 (A4) | 2000+ | 5.5× | Marine, chemical |

For most African construction projects, **hot-dip galvanizing** or **Dacromet** offers the best balance of cost and corrosion resistance.
body.de:
## Comprehensive Specifications for African Buyers

When procuring fasteners for African markets, understanding the complete specifications is critical for quality control and competitive pricing.

### Mechanical Properties

**Property Class 4.6 (Low Carbon)**
- Tensile strength: 400 MPa
- Yield strength: 240 MPa
- Elongation: 22%
- Applications: Non-critical, light duty

**Property Class 8.8 (Medium Carbon)**
- Tensile strength: 800 MPa
- Yield strength: 640 MPa
- Elongation: 12%
- Applications: Most common for construction

**Property Class 10.9 (Alloy Steel)**
- Tensile strength: 1000 MPa
- Yield strength: 900 MPa
- Elongation: 9%
- Applications: High-stress structural

**Property Class 12.9 (Alloy Steel)**
- Tensile strength: 1200 MPa
- Yield strength: 1100 MPa
- Elongation: 8%
- Applications: Automotive, critical applications

### Standard Cross-Reference

| Standard | Region | Common Use |
|----------|--------|------------|
| ISO 898 | International | Mechanical properties |
| DIN 933 | Germany/Europe | Hex head bolts |
| ANSI/ASME B18.2.1 | North America | Hex bolts |
| GB 5783 | China | Hex head bolts |
| JIS B1180 | Japan | Hex bolts |
| SANS 1700 | South Africa | General fasteners |

### Thread Pitch and Sizes

Common thread pitches for African procurement:
- **Coarse (UNC)**: M6×1.0, M8×1.25, M10×1.5, M12×1.75
- **Fine (UNF)**: M6×0.75, M8×1.0, M10×1.25, M12×1.5
- **Extra fine (UNEF)**: M10×1.0, M12×1.25

### Surface Coatings for African Conditions

| Coating | Salt Spray (hours) | Cost (relative) | Best For |
|---------|-------------------|----------------|----------|
| Zinc plating (clear) | 48-96 | 1.0× | Indoor, dry climate |
| Zinc plating (yellow) | 96-200 | 1.1× | General outdoor |
| Hot-dip galvanizing | 500-1000 | 1.8× | Coastal, harsh |
| Dacromet | 500-1000 | 2.0× | High corrosion |
| Stainless 304 (A2) | 1000+ | 4.0× | Premium projects |
| Stainless 316 (A4) | 2000+ | 5.5× | Marine, chemical |

For most African construction projects, **hot-dip galvanizing** or **Dacromet** offers the best balance of cost and corrosion resistance.

question.en: What is the minimum order quantity for African markets?
question.zh: 非洲市场的最低起订量是多少？
question.es: ¿Cuál es la cantidad mínima de pedido para los mercados africanos?
question.ar: ما هي الحد الأدنى للطلب للأسواق الأفريقية؟
question.fr: Quelle est la quantité minimum de commande pour les marchés africains ?
question.pt: Qual é a quantidade mínima de pedido para os mercados africanos?
question.ru: Каков минимальный объем заказа для африканских рынков?
question.ja: アフリカ市場の最低注文数量は？
question.de: Was ist die Mindestbestellmenge für afrikanische Märkte?
question.hi: अफ्रीकी बाजारों के लिए न्यूनतम ऑर्डर मात्रा क्या है?

answer.en: Most Chinese manufacturers accept orders starting from 1-5 tons per specification. For mixed container orders (LCL), the minimum is typically $5,000-$10,000 USD total value. Some suppliers offer smaller trial orders of 500-1000 kg for new customers in African markets.
answer.zh: 大多数中国制造商接受每个规格1-5吨起订。拼箱订单（LCL）最低总价通常为5,000-10,000美元。一些供应商为非洲市场新客户提供500-1000公斤的试订单。
answer.es: La mayoría de los fabricantes chinos aceptan pedidos desde 1-5 toneladas por especificación. Para pedidos en contenedores consolidados (LCL), el mínimo es típicamente $5,000-$10,000 USD. Algunos proveedores ofrecen pedidos de prueba más pequeños de 500-1000 kg para nuevos clientes.
answer.ar: يقبل معظم المصنّعين الصينيين طلبات تبدأ من 1-5 أطنان لكل مواصفة. للطلبات المختلطة (LCL)، الحد الأدنى عادة 5,000-10,000 دولار. بعض الموردين يقدمون طلبات تجريبية 500-1000 كجم.
answer.fr: La plupart des fabricants chinois acceptent des commandes à partir de 1-5 tonnes par spécification. Pour les conteneurs groupés (LCL), le minimum est typiquement de 5 000 à 10 000 USD.
answer.pt: A maioria dos fabricantes chineses aceita pedidos a partir de 1-5 toneladas por especificação. Para contêineres consolidados (LCL), o mínimo é tipicamente 5.000-10.000 USD.
answer.ru: Большинство китайских производителей принимают заказы от 1-5 тонн на спецификацию. Для сборных контейнеров (LCL) минимум обычно 5000-10000 долларов США.
answer.ja: ほとんどの中国メーカーは仕様ごとに1〜5トンからの注文を受け付けます。混載（LCL）の場合、最低でも通常5,000〜10,000米ドルです。
answer.de: Die meisten chinesischen Hersteller akzeptieren Bestellungen ab 1-5 Tonnen pro Spezifikation. Für Sammelcontainer (LCL) liegt das Minimum typischerweise bei 5.000-10.000 USD.
answer.hi: अधिकांश चीनी निर्माता प्रति विशिष्टता 1-5 टन से ऑर्डर स्वीकार करते हैं। मिश्रित कंटेनर (LCL) के लिए न्यूनतम आमतौर पर 5,000-10,000 अमेरिकी डॉलर है।

question.en: How long does shipping take from China to East Africa?
question.zh: 从中国运到东非需要多长时间？
question.es: ¿Cuánto tarda el envío desde China a África Oriental?
question.ar: كم يستغرق الشحن من الصين إلى شرق أفريقيا؟
question.fr: Combien de temps prend l'expédition de la Chine vers l'Afrique de l'Est ?
question.pt: Quanto tempo leva o envio da China para a África Oriental?
question.ru: Сколько времени занимает доставка из Китая в Восточную Африку?
question.ja: 中国から東アフリカまでの輸送時間は？
question.de: Wie lange dauert der Versand von China nach Ostafrika?
question.hi: चीन से पूर्वी अफ्रीका तक शिपिंग में कितना समय लगता है?

answer.en: Standard sea freight from major Chinese ports (Shanghai, Ningbo, Shenzhen) to Mombasa takes 25-30 days, to Dar es Salaam 30-35 days, and to Durban 35-45 days. Express air freight is available for urgent orders (5-7 days) but costs 5-8x more than sea freight. Transit time includes customs clearance at the destination port.
answer.zh: 从中国主要港口（上海、宁波、深圳）到蒙巴萨的标准海运需要25-30天，到达累斯萨拉姆30-35天，到德班35-45天。紧急订单可加急空运（5-7天），但成本是海运的5-8倍。运输时间包括目的港清关。
answer.es: El flete marítimo estándar desde los principales puertos chinos a Mombasa toma 25-30 días, a Dar es Salaam 30-35 días, y a Durban 35-45 días. El flete aéreo urgente está disponible para pedidos urgentes (5-7 días) pero cuesta 5-8 veces más.
answer.ar: الشحن البحري القياسي من الموانئ الصينية الرئيسية إلى مومباسا 25-30 يوماً، إلى دار السلام 30-35 يوماً، إلى ديربان 35-45 يوماً. الشحن الجوي السريع متاح (5-7 أيام) لكنه يكلف 5-8 أضعاف.
answer.fr: Le fret maritime standard des principaux ports chinois vers Mombasa prend 25-30 jours, vers Dar es Salaam 30-35 jours, et vers Durban 35-45 jours.
answer.pt: O frete marítimo padrão dos principais portos chineses para Mombaça leva 25-30 dias, para Dar es Salaam 30-35 dias, e para Durban 35-45 dias.
answer.ru: Стандартная морская перевозка из крупных китайских портов в Момбасу занимает 25-30 дней, в Дар-эс-Салам 30-35 дней, в Дурбан 35-45 дней.
answer.ja: 中国の主要港からモンバサへの標準海運は25〜30日、ダルエスサラーム30〜35日、ダーバン35〜45日です。緊急航空便は5〜7日ですが、5〜8倍のコストがかかります。
answer.de: Standard-Seefracht von großen chinesischen Häfen nach Mombasa dauert 25-30 Tage, nach Dar es Salaam 30-35 Tage, und nach Durban 35-45 Tage.
answer.hi: प्रमुख चीनी बंदरगाहों से मोम्बासा तक मानक समुद्री माल ढुलाई में 25-30 दिन, दार एस सलाम तक 30-35 दिन, और डरबन तक 35-45 दिन लगते हैं।

question.en: What payment terms are accepted for African buyers?
question.zh: 非洲买家接受哪些付款方式？
question.es: ¿Qué términos de pago se aceptan para compradores africanos?
question.ar: ما هي شروط الدفع المقبولة للمشترين الأفارقة؟
question.fr: Quels sont les termes de paiement acceptés pour les acheteurs africains ?
question.pt: Quais termos de pagamento são aceitos para compradores africanos?
question.ru: Какие условия оплаты принимаются для африканских покупателей?
question.ja: アフリカのバイヤーはどのような支払い条件を受け入れますか？
question.de: Welche Zahlungsbedingungen werden für afrikanische Käufer akzeptiert?
question.hi: अफ्रीकी खरीदारों के लिए कौन से भुगतान शर्तें स्वीकार की जाती हैं?

answer.en: Common payment terms for African fastener imports: (1) T/T (Telegraphic Transfer) - 30% deposit, 70% balance before shipment, (2) L/C (Letter of Credit) at sight or 30/60/90 days, (3) D/P (Documents against Payment), (4) OA (Open Account) for established customers. New customers typically start with T/T or L/C, with credit terms available after 6-12 months of successful orders.
answer.zh: 非洲紧固件进口的常见付款方式：(1) T/T（电汇）- 30%定金，发货前付清70%余款，(2) 即期或30/60/90天信用证（L/C），(3) D/P（付款交单），(4) 老客户的OA（赊销）。新客户通常从T/T或L/C开始，成功下单6-12个月后可获得信用条款。
answer.es: Términos de pago comunes: (1) T/T - 30% depósito, 70% saldo antes del envío, (2) L/C a la vista o 30/60/90 días, (3) D/P, (4) Cuenta abierta para clientes establecidos.
answer.ar: شروط الدفع الشائعة: (1) تحويل مصرفي - 30% عربون، 70% قبل الشحن، (2) خطاب اعتماد، (3) دفع مقابل المستندات، (4) حساب مفتوح للعملاء الدائمين.
answer.fr: Termes de paiement courants : (1) Virement - 30% d'acompte, 70% avant expédition, (2) Lettre de crédit, (3) Documents contre paiement, (4) Compte ouvert.
answer.pt: Termos comuns: (1) T/T - 30% de depósito, 70% antes do envio, (2) Carta de crédito, (3) Documentos contra pagamento, (4) Conta aberta.
answer.ru: Общие условия: (1) Банковский перевод - 30% депозит, 70% перед отгрузкой, (2) Аккредитив, (3) Документы против платежа, (4) Открытый счет.
answer.ja: 一般的な支払い条件：(1) T/T - 30%の頭金、出荷前に70%、(2) L/C一覧または30/60/90日、(3) D/P、(4) 確立された顧客のオープンアカウント。
answer.de: Häufige Zahlungsbedingungen: (1) T/T - 30% Anzahlung, 70% vor Versand, (2) Akkreditiv, (3) Dokumente gegen Zahlung, (4) Offenes Konto.
answer.hi: सामान्य भुगतान शर्तें: (1) T/T - 30% जमा, शिपमेंट से पहले 70%, (2) L/C सा�ight या 30/60/90 दिन, (3) D/P, (4) स्थापित ग्राहकों के लिए खुला खाता।
